geopolitical_risks.description: Trump's tariff-driven trade policy continues. Baseline 10% tariff on most imports, higher country-specific tariffs on China. China achieved record $1.1T trade surplus despite tariffs via transshipment.
geopolitical_risks.portfolio_impact: Supply chain disruption, higher costs for tech imports
geopolitical_risks.mitigation: 다변화된 지역 배분, 미국 내수 중심 기업 선호
geopolitical_risks.original_text: Trump threatened to rekindle a trade war with Europe over the U.S. administration's aim to take over Greenland. Despite Trump's tariffs, China achieved a record $1.1 trillion trade surplus by rerouting manufacturing through Southeast Asian countries.

geopolitical_risks.description: Ongoing tensions but contained. US-Korea alliance remains strong despite tariff discussions.
geopolitical_risks.portfolio_impact: Korean won volatility, defense sector tailwind

geopolitical_risks.description: Kevin Warsh nomination raises questions about Fed independence. Trump pushing for aggressive rate cuts.
geopolitical_risks.original_text: Warsh's nomination raises questions about the central bank's independence and future monetary policy. The change in Fed leadership could have far-reaching consequences for consumer borrowing costs.

economic_risks.description: Inflation remains 'somewhat elevated' above 2% target. Tariffs could add to price pressures.
economic_risks.portfolio_impact: Real returns erosion, bond price pressure
economic_risks.mitigation: TIPS, 주식 비중 유지, 단기채 선호

economic_risks.description: US economy expanding at solid pace (4.4% Q3). Job market stabilizing. Recession risk low.
China pursuing 'moderately loose' monetary policy with rate cuts. Property market challenges persist.
economic_risks.portfolio_impact: 신흥국 수요 둔화, 원자재 가격 압력
economic_risks.mitigation: 중국 직접 투자 제한, 신흥국 분산

market_risks.description: KOSPI surge driven by AI stocks raises bubble concerns. Valuations stretched after 22.7% January rally.
market_risks.mitigation: 분할 매수, 이익 실현 전략, 집중 투자 회피
market_risks.original_text: The KOSPI rally occurred despite lingering concerns about a potential market bubble.

market_risks.description: Gold/silver crashed 9-31% in single day. Extreme volatility expected to continue.
market_risks.mitigation: 귀금속 투자 회피 또는 극소량 배분

market_risks.description: BlackRock warns long-term government bonds no longer effective portfolio stabilizers. Stablecoin issuers becoming major Treasury buyers.
market_risks.original_text: BlackRock has expressed concerns about the sustainability of long-term government bonds, suggesting they are no longer effective portfolio stabilizers.

optimistic.name: Goldilocks Scenario
conditions: AI growth sustains without bubble burst

base.name: Muddle Through
conditions: AI growth continues but with volatility

pessimistic.name: Correction/Stagflation
conditions: Fed forced to hold or hike on persistent inflation

risk_asset_recommendation.rationale: Base scenario supports risk assets; DC형 70% 한도 준수

hedging_strategies: 섹터 분산으로 AI 집중 리스크 완화
key_monitoring_indicators: Fed FOMC 결정 및 Warsh 청문회
